japanese_name: OXO Tot 2-in-1 Go Potty
description: OXO Tot 2-in-1 Go Potty. Foldable travel potty seat that sits on toilets or stands alone with bags. For Japan days with tiny bladders and zero patience.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: OXO Tot 2-in-1 Go Potty, Richell potty seat, foldable toilet seat, disposable travel potty]

japanese_name: エジモット ステップアップお箸
description: EDIMOTTO Step-Up Chopsticks. Ring-guided chopsticks that teach finger placement without turning lunch into hand combat. Kid-table chaos, lightly supervised.

japanese_name: Pagong シルクポーチセット
description: Pagong silk pouch set. Small Kyoto textile pouches for coins, lip balm, receipts, and the shrine charms you swore were enough.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: silk pouch, gamaguchi pouch, chirimen pouch, yukata fabric drawstring pouch]

japanese_name: キンカン 120mL
description: Kinkan. Topical bite-and-itch liquid with that sharp cooling slap. Summer mosquito legs, meet your yellow-bottle boss.

japanese_name: キノキ足裏樹液シート
description: Kinoki foot pads. Overnight foot stickers with big claims and bigger side-eye. Buy for the chaos, not because your feet run a toxin export business.
notes: No reliable image source found. Product claims need extra caution.

input_name: Kinoko no Yama / Takenoko no Sato
english_name: Kinoko no Yama / Takenoko no Sato
japanese_name: きのこの山 / たけのこの里
description: Kinoko no Yama versus Takenoko no Sato. Chocolate mushroom biscuits against chocolate bamboo-shoot cookies. Japan's snack civil war, boxed and tiny.
notes: [AMBIGUOUS: Kinoko no Yama, Takenoko no Sato]

english_name: KireiKirei Medicated Hand Sanitizing Gel Plus
japanese_name: キレイキレイ 薬用手指の消毒ジェルプラス
description: KireiKirei hand gel. Pocket sanitizer for train snacks, playground railings, and the pre-konbini chicken wipe-down.
notes: [AMBIGUOUS: KireiKirei Medicated Hand Sanitizing Gel Plus, KireiKirei 99.99% Sanitizing Wet Sheets, KireiKirei Antibacterial Wet Sheets]

input_name: Kit Kat Chocolatory Custom Kit Kat
japanese_name: チョコラボ キットカット
description: Chocollabo Kit Kat. Custom photo Kit Kat box. Cute gift, mildly dangerous when your face becomes someone's snack.
notes: [VENUE_CATEGORY: Kit Kat Chocolatory/custom; Chocollabo Kit Kat, My KitKat, Chocolatory Sublime]

japanese_name: キットカット 濃い抹茶
description: Kit Kat Koi Matcha. Green tea bitterness under the sweet shell. The airport box everyone grabs after pretending gifts are for other people.
notes: [AMBIGUOUS: Kit Kat Koi Matcha, Kit Kat Uji Matcha, Kit Kat Otona no Amasa Matcha]

input_name: Kit Kat Sake / Hojicha / Daigaku Imo / Regional Flavors
japanese_name: キットカット 日本酒
description: Kit Kat Japan Sake. Regional souvenir-box candy with sake flavor. A very Japan answer to the question, 'what if my chocolate had nightlife energy?'
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Kit Kat Japan Sake, Kit Kat Uji Hojicha, Kit Kat Daigaku Imo, Kit Kat regional flavors]

japanese_name: キットカット わさび
description: Kit Kat Wasabi. Sweet white-chocolate wafer with a Shizuoka wasabi kick. The prank gift that still tastes suspiciously good.

japanese_name: コクヨ キャンパスノート 5冊パック
description: Kokuyo Campus notebook set. Japan's student notebook default in a five-pack. Buy it and briefly become the person who color-codes subjects.

english_name: Kokuyo Campus Compact Portable Book Clip
japanese_name: コクヨ キャンパス コンパクトに持ち運べるブッククリップ
description: Kokuyo Campus portable book clip. Tiny rotating clip that holds pages open. For hands-free ramen manuals, textbooks, and travel planning spirals.

japanese_name: コクヨ キャンパスノート
description: Kokuyo Campus notebook. Smooth Japanese school notebook with neat ruling and no drama. The stationery aisle version of getting your life together for ¥200.

input_name: Konbini Drip Coffee (Seven Cafe / Machi Cafe)
english_name: Seven Cafe / Machi Cafe Drip Coffee
japanese_name: セブンカフェ / マチカフェ ドリップコーヒー
description: Konbini drip coffee. Push-button fresh coffee from Seven Cafe or Machi Cafe. Cheap, hot, reliable, and better than the hotel lobby machine.
notes: [VENUE_CATEGORY: konbini coffee; Seven Cafe hot coffee, Seven Cafe iced coffee, Lawson Machi Cafe hot coffee, Lawson Machi Cafe iced coffee] No reliable image source found.

japanese_name: ななチキ
description: Nanachiki. Hot-case fried chicken packed to go. Eat it now, or take it back to the room like a responsible gremlin.
notes: [VENUE_CATEGORY: konbini hot food; Nanachiki, Famichiki, Lawson Karaage-kun, croquette] No reliable image source found.

japanese_name: ビニール傘
description: Konbini vinyl umbrella. Clear plastic umbrella sold when the sky betrays everyone. Buy one once, lose it twice, join Japan.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: 7-Eleven umbrella, Lawson umbrella, FamilyMart umbrella, Donki vinyl umbrella] Source not verified. No reliable image source found.

japanese_name: コンビニ弁当
description: Konbini bento box. Ready-to-eat rice meal that staff can heat at the register. The no-reservation dinner plan for jet lagged humans.
notes: [VENUE_CATEGORY: konbini bento; makunouchi bento, chicken bento, hamburg bento, curry rice bento] No reliable image source found.

japanese_name: ソフティモ スピーディ クレンジングオイル
description: Softymo Speedy Cleansing Oil. Pink-bottle cleansing oil that melts sunscreen and makeup fast. Drugstore shelf hero for people who wore SPF like a responsible adult.

japanese_name: 無印良品 ポリエステル両面使える洗濯ネット
description: MUJI laundry net. Mesh wash bag for delicates and tiny socks. The cheap Japan life upgrade hotel washing machines never warn you about.

japanese_name: ルタオ ドゥーブルフロマージュ
description: LeTAO Double Fromage. Hokkaido-style double-layer cheesecake. Buy frozen, thaw slowly, then watch people get weirdly quiet after one bite.

japanese_name: ミドリ 便箋・封筒セット
description: MIDORI letter set. Washi-style paper and envelopes that make normal handwriting look intentional. Stationery shops sell this to people who still believe in nice paper.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: MIDORI letter set, washi letter paper, wagami envelopes, Japanese stationery sets]

input_name: Lip Bambi Sleeping Pack / Laneige-style overnight balm
japanese_name: ラネージュ リップスリーピングマスク
description: LANEIGE Lip Sleeping Mask. Overnight lip balm in the little jar everyone copies. Dry-lip emergency deluxe.
notes: [AMBIGUOUS: Lip Bambi Sleeping Pack, LANEIGE Lip Sleeping Mask, other overnight lip masks] No reliable image source found.

japanese_name: とらや工房 大福
description: Toraya Kobo daifuku. Fresh mochi wagashi with bean paste, made to be eaten quickly. Pick it up from a sweets counter and do not save it for later like a fool.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: fresh mochi, daifuku, seasonal namagashi, mame daifuku]
